behavior_summary: U8P_INTERN::look is a simple U8P_INTERN::look/examine handler that displays a single short description to the player: the text 'Human Remains'.
The process runs when the engine invokes the object's U8P_INTERN::look/examine process and immediately emits the bark and suspends; there is no branching, menu, or external interaction.
Inference: the INTERN entity is likely a corpse or collection of remains based on the displayed text.
notable_control_flow: U8P_INTERN::look is implemented as a process (processType 0x0208) triggered by player 'U8P_INTERN::look/examine'.
Control flow: enter U8P_INTERN::look -> emit Bark('Human Remains') -> suspend/end process. No conditionals or further logic are present.
open_questions: Is the INTERN instance only a static decoration/corpse (purely descriptive), or does it have relevance to any quest or flag elsewhere in the game? No flags or calls in this script reference broader quest state.
